goal: Review the provided patch, identify key risks, and draft release notes for the change
scope: Review only the provided diff and related notes; do not modify code or broaden to unrelated modules
constraints: Keep the review scoped to the submitted patch
Distinguish verified findings from speculative concerns
Draft release notes in concise product language
success_criteria: Identifies major risks or review concerns
assumptions: Assume the diff is the only intended review scope
Assume release notes are internal-draft quality unless stated otherwise
completion_definition: Done when review notes and a release note draft are prepared from the provided patch
fallback_if_blocked: If test evidence is missing, complete the review with explicit uncertainty
